figures.caption: Figure 4: Evaluation on Bug Repairing Ability for RTL-repair[11], MEIC[24], UVLLM[9] and Clover. The first 17 benchmarks are easy cases with only one module and one file, and the rest are much more complex. The color implies the pass@1 rate of each case. P: total passed tests.
